figures.caption: Table 2 Comparative performance on CAFA3 in terms of Fmax. Seq, Text, Struct, PPI, and Hom denote sequence, text, structure, PPI, and homology inputs, respectively. Results for sequence-based and homologybased methods are from Oliveira et al. (2023), while those for TransFun, DeepGraphGO, and the DualNetGO variants are from Chen and Luo (2024). Ours denotes a single trained model with dynamic masking. Best values are shown in bold; second-best values are underlined.
